calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Kelina Smith appeared by telephone for Administrator.

The Court noted that there is an amendment for a request of an additional $4,036.00 in extraordinary compensation for responding to the Probate Examiner's notes and questions how the estate benefitted. Ms. Smith stated the additional fee request was for assisting the estate in providing additional information regarding the time report. The Court questions whether this was a benefit to the firm, rather than the estate. Ms. Smith stated that the Client felt this was necessary to resolve the estate. The First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-31-2019 Continued To Feb-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on February 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they cannot comply with the Court's order. The Parties are ordered to file a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration no later than January 28, 2020. Status on close of estate is also continued to February 4, 2020.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.
